typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update runtime-orchestration-worker validator command snippets to use BurnBar* test filters from .factory/services.yaml instead of legacy OpenBurnBar* filters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review m7-runservice-failover-scorecard-ordering found SKILL.md lines 22-24, 36, and 41 still reference OpenBurnBarRunServiceTests/OpenBurnBarMissionControlServiceTests/OpenBurnBarProviderRouterTests while services.yaml canon uses BurnBar* filters.
